# Copilot Instructions for fish-ia

`ds/Domain Sense IA.md` is the normative source of truth for the agent's working algorithm in this repository.

Before any code, requirement, or implementation change, the agent must read and follow these sections in `ds/Domain Sense IA.md`:

1. Compilation Pipeline
2. Command Gates (DS, DSC, DSR, DS~R, IMP, REF, GO)
3. DSR: Execution checklist (in order)

The agent must comply with the rules and scenarios described in Domain Sense and must not invent additional process rules here.

If a request is ambiguous, clarify the target stage first.
